_note: Provisioned concurrency config for cron-backfill-2024:$LATEST — 2 units allocated. This is the source of the $35/mo cost despite zero invocations. The keep-warm pings from AWS to maintain provisioned concurrency do NOT count as Invocations (they show up as ProvisionedConcurrencyInvocations only when an INVOKE actually arrives — which it doesn't, since invocations are zero). No keep-warm noise to subtract here; the function is genuinely idle.
